# Copilot CLI Quality Gates Configuration

This directory contains automated quality gate hooks for GitHub Copilot CLI.

## Files

### `post-generation.sh`
Main quality gate script that runs three checks:
- Ruff linting
- Pyright type checking
- Pytest fast tests

### `README.md`
Documentation for the quality gate system

## Integration

These hooks are referenced in:
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md` - Agent instructions for automatic execution
- `.github/copilot-hooks/README.md` - User-facing documentation

## Agent Behavior

When the Copilot CLI agent modifies code, it will:

1. Run `.github/copilot-hooks/post-generation.sh`
2. If gates fail, intercept errors
3. Self-correct the code
4. Re-run quality gates
5. Repeat until all gates pass
6. Only then present results to user

This ensures all code modifications meet TTA.dev standards automatically.
